title: calamintha × bolnokensis
intro: Calamintha × bolnokensis, also known as Bolckenberry Calamint, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the mint family and is a cross between Calamintha officinalis and Clinopodium vulgare. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Calamintha × bolnokensis include relief from symptoms of nausea, headaches, and fever, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce stress. Calamintha × bolnokensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and creams, for topical application.
